title: ursinia scariosa subsp. subhirsuta
intro: Ursinia scariosa subsp. subhirsuta is a plant species within the daisy family, commonly known as a shrub or an herb that grows in arid and semi-arid regions. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ursinia scariosa subsp. subhirsuta include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
